settings.features.auto_open_code_review_.zh: 自动打开代码审查面板

settings.features.autohides_on_loss_of_k.en: Autohides on loss of keyboard focus
settings.features.autohides_on_loss_of_k.zh: 失去键盘焦点时自动隐藏

settings.features.automatically_open_lin.en: Automatically open links in desktop app whenever possible.
settings.features.automatically_open_lin.zh: 尽可能在桌面应用中打开链接。

settings.features.choose_a_layout_to_ope.en: Choose a layout to open files in Warp
settings.features.choose_a_layout_to_ope.zh: 选择在 Warp 中打开文件的布局

settings.features.choose_an_editor_to_op.en: Choose an editor to open file links
settings.features.choose_an_editor_to_op.zh: 选择打开文件链接的编辑器

settings.features.choose_an_editor_to_op.en: Choose an editor to open files from the code review panel, project explorer, and global search
settings.features.choose_an_editor_to_op.zh: 选择从代码审查面板、项目资源管理器和全局搜索打开文件的编辑器

settings.features.edit_code_and_commands.en: Edit code and commands with Vim keybindings
settings.features.edit_code_and_commands.zh: 使用 Vim 键绑定编辑代码和命令

settings.features.enable_context_menu_in.en: Enable '@' context menu in terminal mode
settings.features.enable_context_menu_in.zh: 在终端模式中启用 @ 上下文菜单

settings.features.error_underlining_for_.zh: 为命令错误添加下划线

settings.features.group_files_into_singl.en: Group files into single editor pane
settings.features.group_files_into_singl.zh: 将文件分组到单个编辑器面板

settings.features.lines_scrolled_by_mous.en: Lines scrolled by mouse wheel interval

settings.features.make_warp_the_default_.zh: 将 Warp 设为默认终端

settings.features.open_markdown_files_in.en: Open Markdown files in Warp's Markdown Viewer by default
settings.features.open_markdown_files_in.zh: 默认在 Warp Markdown 查看器中打开 Markdown 文件

settings.features.open_completions_menu_.en: Open completions menu as you type
settings.features.open_completions_menu_.zh: 输入时自动打开补全菜单

settings.features.open_links_in_desktop_.zh: 在桌面应用中打开链接

settings.features.quit_when_all_windows_.en: Quit when all windows are closed

settings.features.receive_desktop_notifi.zh: 接收 Warp 桌面通知

settings.features.restore_windows_tabs_a.en: Restore windows, tabs, and panes on startup
settings.features.restore_windows_tabs_a.zh: 启动时恢复窗口、标签和面板

settings.features.set_unnamed_register_a.en: Set unnamed register as system clipboard
settings.features.set_unnamed_register_a.zh: 将未命名寄存器设为系统剪贴板

settings.features.show_changelog_toast_a.zh: 更新后显示更新日志提示

settings.features.show_tooltip_on_click_.en: Show tooltip on click on links

settings.features.start_warp_at_login_re.zh: 登录时启动 Warp（需要 macOS 13+）

settings.features.when_a_command_takes_l.en: When a command takes longer than

settings.features.when_this_setting_is_o.en: When this setting is on, any files opened in the same tab will be automatically grouped into a single editor pane.
settings.features.when_this_setting_is_o.zh: 开启此设置后，在同一标签页中打开的文件将自动分组到单个编辑器面板。

settings.features.window_positions_won_t.en: Window positions won't be restored on Wayland.
settings.features.window_positions_won_t.zh: Wayland 上窗口位置不会被恢复。
